basic_details.job_title: CSIR CFTRI Project Associate – I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Central Food Technological Research Institute (CSIR CFTRI)

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PwBD/Women: 5 years, OBC: 3 years

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Microbiology/Biotechnology/Biochemistry from recognized University
qualification.details: Master's degree in Microbiology/Biotechnology/Biochemistry from recognized University

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR CFTRI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download CSIR CFTRI Project Associate – I Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR CFTRI Project Associate – I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the CSIR CFTRI Project Associate – I posts is 21st June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate – I position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Microbiology, Biotechnology, or Biochemistry from a recognized university to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate – I role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Associate – I position is 35 years as of 21st June 2026.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for SC/ST/PwBD/Women candidates (5 years) and OBC candidates (3 years).

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate – I post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 25,000/- plus HRA.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate – I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Associate – I post as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Associate – I recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official CSIR CFTRI website.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the links to the official notification and the online application form in the "Important Links" section of this article.
